title: No End Void
description: Fall in the void in the end? Just get teleported to the sky in the overworld! You still might die of fall damage, but your stuff isn't gone forever!
body: When you fall into the void in the end, you are teleported to the same X and Z coords in the overworld, but above the build limit. This way your items are not lost when you die, and you still have a chance to survive!
